mapper.select: SELECT config_key AS configKey, config_value AS configValue, description FROM widget_config
SELECT holiday_date AS holidayDate, holiday_name AS holidayName FROM widget_holiday ORDER BY holiday_date ASC
SELECT id, question, option_a AS optionA, option_b AS optionB, created_at AS createdAt FROM balance_game ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO balance_game (question, option_a, option_b) VALUES (#{question}, #{optionA}, #{optionB})
INSERT INTO balance_game_vote (question_id, ip_address, selection) VALUES (#{questionId}, #{ipAddress}, #{selection})
